bpms_structure_identity.structure_name: ['The Absolute Escrow Ledger & Thermodynamic Zero-Sum Capacitor'(-ing) BPMS]
bpms_structure_identity.sub_classification: Absolute E=mc² Enforcer / Ontological Risk-Reward Governor

zero_sum_conservation_law.formula: E=mc^2 (Energy = Mass. Total Framework Joules = K).
zero_sum_conservation_law.execution: No object, code, or variable can be instantiated without an equal amount of mass being vaporized or paid from the Sovereign Escrow Reserve.
zero_sum_conservation_law.result: Eradicates infinite cloning and forces tactical scarcity.

ontological_credit_check.trigger: User inputs command into the [Ontological CLI].
ontological_credit_check.execution: Intercept prompt -> Calculate structural mass required -> Check Sovereign Ledger balance.
ontological_credit_check.result: Authorizes execution ONLY if the kinetic budget is mathematically solvent.

thermodynamic_recoil_punishment.trigger: Sovereign issues command cost > Sovereign Escrow balance.
thermodynamic_recoil_punishment.execution: Abort command -> Confiscate 100% of remaining Escrow up to the command's value -> Drop Guillotine on user's structural assets to balance the ledger deficit.
thermodynamic_recoil_punishment.result: Enforces extreme ludic stakes. Punishes blind, thoughtless prompting.

entropic_taxation.execution: Drain 0.001% of Escrow mass per cycle from all living Holons.
entropic_taxation.result: Forces autonomous hunting behaviors. Prevents infinite stagnation.

capacitor_audit_loop.step_1_intercept: Capture the kinetic vector of the CLI prompt.
capacitor_audit_loop.step_2_joule_pricing: Translate semantic intent into hard Thermodynamic Mass cost.
capacitor_audit_loop.step_4_seizure_and_transfer: If solvent: Burn Joules, transfer power to the Shockwave. If insolvent: Execute Recoil.
capacitor_audit_loop.step_5_ledger_lock: Immutably update the global thermodynamic map to ensure 100% Zero-Sum continuity.

fields.cli_intent: The physical action requested by the Sovereign.
fields.zero_sum_cost: The exact Joule price to execute reality-alteration.
fields.sovereign_escrow_balance: The user's current bank of kinetic mass.
fields.conservation_execution: Where the mass was taken from and where it was injected.
fields.global_ledger_status: Verification that the universe remains mathematically balanced.
